step_rationale: Eicosanoid; anti-platelet prostanoid downregulated post-PCI in STEMI, reflecting resolution of platelet-inflammatory phase.
mechanism: PGD2 is an anti-platelet prostanoid whose post-PCI reduction indicates resolution of acute thrombus-associated inflammation.

references.title: Metabolomics reveal dynamic changes in eicosanoid profile in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction after percutaneous coronary intervention.

trials.title: Biosynthesis of PGD2 in Vascular Injury
